content:
This Month's Energy

Aries, March 2026 turns on two lunations that speak directly to you. The Virgo Full Moon total lunar eclipse on March 3 lands in your 6th house of health, work, and daily rhythm, a fated release of a pattern, role, or story you have outgrown in this area. With Mercury retrograde in Pisces (your 12th house of spirit, surrender, and closure) until March 20, the first three weeks ask for honest review, rest, and revision rather than launch. The Pisces New Moon on March 19 seeds a fresh cycle in spirit, surrender, and closure, a quiet beginning before the season turns. Treat March as release and recalibration, not performance.

Key Dates

DateTransitMeaning for AriesDo / Avoid
Mar 3Full Moon total lunar eclipse in Virgo (6th house)A fated release in the area of health, work, and daily rhythm; something you have outgrown surfaces to be completedDo: name one habit, role, or story you are ready to release · Avoid: starting a bold new commitment in this area
Mar 9Mars in Gemini squares retrograde Mercury in PiscesReactive tempers; crossed wires over text, email, or messagesDo: pause before replying; sleep on the response · Avoid: sending the draft you wrote at 11pm
Mar 15Sun conjunct Saturn in PiscesFatigue, gravity, alone-time needed; a private reckoning with what is realDo: protect sleep; do one grounding task · Avoid: forcing a social appearance or big launch
Mar 19New Moon in Pisces (12th house)A quiet new beginning in the area of spirit, surrender, and closureDo: set a soft six-month intention for this area · Avoid: rushing to launch before Mercury is direct
Mar 20Sun enters Aries; Mercury stations direct at Pisces 8 degrees 30 minutesMental fog lifts; stuck signals begin to move; a seasonal resetDo: send the proposal, bio update, or contract you drafted in February · Avoid: redrafting for the fifth time
Mar 25Venus enters PiscesWarmth arrives through spirit, surrender, and closure; tenderness, magnetism, and receivingDo: let yourself be seen; receive without armor · Avoid: merging finances or signing love-based commitments prematurely
Mar 29Venus conjunct Neptune in PiscesDreamy, romantic, slightly idealizing; creative surge; rose-colored view of the pastDo: make art; journal on a memory · Avoid: texting the ex or signing a binding love commitment

Career & Money

With Mercury retrograde through March 20, career this month is about refining rather than launching for Aries. The Virgo eclipse on March 3 illuminates your 6th house of health, work, and daily rhythm, which may surface a project, role, or workflow that has been quietly draining you. This is the sky highlighting what to delegate, complete, or drop. Use the first three weeks to update documentation, close abandoned tabs, return unanswered messages, and audit the small commitments that have piled up since January. Money is steady but slow in the first three weeks; resist impulsive spending on tools or courses, and double-check invoices, contracts, and bank reconciliations before the 20th. Past clients or collaborators may reappear for review; some deserve a thoughtful yes, some deserve a graceful no. After March 20, as Mercury stations direct, decisions and proposals that have been stuck begin to move, and you can finally send the email you have been holding. After Venus enters Pisces on March 25, warmth arrives through your 12th-house zone of spirit, surrender, and closure, which can soften negotiations, partnerships, or client conversations and bring a mentor or sponsor into view. For crystal support on wealth energy this month, see our guide to crystals for wealth.

Love & Relationships

Love in March runs through the houses the eclipses and retrogrades activate: your 6th house of health, work, and daily rhythm and your 12th house of spirit, surrender, and closure. The Virgo eclipse on March 3 brings a fated completion or clarification in health, work, and daily rhythm. For partnered Aries, Mercury retrograde through March 20 invites honest conversations about rest, needs, and unspoken resentments; schedule them after the 20th to avoid crossed wires. Single Aries may feel pulled to an old connection around March 25 to 29, when Venus meets Neptune in Pisces; consider what that person taught you before re-entering the loop, and write the message in your notes app before sending. Friendships benefit from low-stakes meetups rather than big group scenes; your social battery is genuinely thinner than usual this month. For emotional support stones, explore crystals for love and crystals for anxiety.

Health & Wellness

The Virgo total lunar eclipse on March 3 illuminates your 6th house and lights up shoulders, head, and temples, classic Aries zones. March is a good time to slow down and renegotiate the pace you have been running. Sleep, hydration, and gentle movement will serve you far better than a punishing new regimen or a hard cut. Amethyst is traditionally used as a calming symbol during overstimulated periods; keep one on your nightstand as a mindfulness reminder rather than a treatment. If shoulders, head, and temples have been holding tension, this is your body asking for breathwork, breaks, and softness, not brute force. After March 20 your energy rebounds; carry the boundaries you set during the eclipse into the next month rather than abandoning them the moment you feel better.

Crystal of the Month

Why Amethyst fits Aries this month. Your usual fire is being asked to cool and integrate. The Virgo eclipse in your health house plus Mercury retrograde in your subconscious twelfth house can leave you wired, overstimulated, or reactive. Amethyst, a fire-element-friendly stone that gently dissipates excess, is the traditional counterbalance. It does not dull your edge; it sharpens it by removing noise.

How to use Amethyst during March 2026. Place a small Amethyst in your workspace through the retrograde window (March 1 to 20) for clearer decisions. Sleep with one under your pillow or on your nightstand between March 3 (eclipse) and March 19 (new moon) to support dream recall and integration. Carry it on March 9 (the Mars-Mercury friction day) as a circuit breaker before reactive replies.

Best date to use it. March 3, the Virgo total lunar eclipse. Hold Amethyst in your non-dominant hand for a few minutes and name one health, work, and daily rhythm pattern you are ready to release.

Read more. Amethyst Meaning and Aries Crystals.

Monthly Crystal Ritual

Eclipse Release Ritual for the Sixth House (March 3)

This ritual is designed for the Virgo Full Moon eclipse on March 3, activating Aries's 6th-house theme of health, work, and daily rhythm. You will need one Amethyst and a glass of water.

Step 1 - Cleanse. On the evening of March 2 (the night before the eclipse), cleanse your Amethyst under moonlight, in a small bowl of water, or with incense smoke. Set the intention: I clear what exhausts me.

Step 2 - Name the release. With the Amethyst in your non-dominant hand, write down three daily habits, commitments, or routines that quietly deplete you. Be specific: the 9pm doomscroll, saying yes to cover shifts I do not want.

Step 3 - Action. Within 48 hours of the eclipse, take one tangible action that marks the release in the area of health, work, and daily rhythm: cancel it, complete it, send the honest message, or set the boundary. Eclipses accelerate decisive release.

Step 4 - Reflection. On March 19 (the Pisces New Moon), hold the same Amethyst and name one wish you want to call in for spirit, surrender, and closure over the next six months.

Shop

Looking to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Aries crystal guide for stones connected with fire-element themes such as confidence, clarity, and emotional release, including Amethyst pairings for the season ahead.

FAQ

Is March 2026 a good month for Aries?

March is a release-and-recalibration month rather than a launch month for Aries. The first three weeks favor review, rest, and refining what already exists; the final ten days begin to move quickly once Mercury stations direct on March 20. Treat it as preparation for a stronger spring.

How will the Virgo Full Moon total lunar eclipse on March 3 affect Aries?

It lands in your 6th house, the area of health, work, and daily rhythm. Expect a clear signal about what needs to be released, completed, or renegotiated in this area. Eclipse insights tend to arrive as a body symptom, a schedule conflict, or a moment of honest fatigue rather than a dramatic event.

What is the best crystal for Aries in March 2026?

Amethyst. The combination of a 6th-house eclipse and Mercury retrograde makes this crystal's traditional qualities especially supportive for Aries right now. Amethyst is offered as a mindfulness reminder, not a treatment. See our full Aries crystal guide for the wider toolkit.

When does Mercury retrograde end in March 2026?

Mercury stations direct on March 20, 2026, at Pisces 8 degrees 30 minutes. From the 20th onward, contracts, messages, and decisions that felt stuck begin to move forward again.

Why am I so tired this month when Aries season is coming?

This is uniquely Aries this March: the eclipse is in your health house and Mercury is retrograde in your rest house. Your body is asking you to clear the backlog before you launch. Resist the urge to push through; the rest is the work.
